positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from this close-up tabletop food scene: a white bowl of green soup with egg, a spoon holding sour cream over the bowl, sliced bread behind it, green onions on a blue-and-white striped cloth, and an open blue-and-white Prostokvashino sour cream tub with peeled foil and visible Cyrillic label. Preserve the original aspect ratio, composition, food placement, hands, spoon, bowl, bread, onions, product tub, logo and 15% mark. The first frame is already the final moment of adding sour cream, not the start of scooping. During the clip, the spoon tilts slightly, the remaining sour cream slides gently onto the existing dollop, then the spoon lifts a few centimeters and settles above the bowl. By the final frames, the sour cream rests on the soup surface with small ripples fading. Use very subtle cinematic camera drift with gentle parallax, minimal and stable. Add only soft soup ripples, slight cream spreading, and small reflections on the spoon, foil, tub and tabletop. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, stable shapes, smooth temporal consistency.
negative_prompt: Do not pour the whole tub into the soup, do not stir the soup, do not scoop from the tub again, do not move or eat the bread, do not change the product package, do not close the foil lid, do not distort the Cyrillic label or 15% mark, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing bowl, missing spoon, missing sour cream tub, missing bread, missing onions, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled liquid motion, splashing, random changes, melting food, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent spoon shape, deformed hands, extra fingers, extra hands, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden pose change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic texture, text artifacts, logo distortion.
